category_sources: source_facts.description says cppcheck performs static analysis of C and C++ code; official site calls it a static C/C++ code analysis tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cppcheck; official site brands the project as Cppcheck.
docs_sources: Official Cppcheck site is the project documentation hub; official manual PDF provides dedicated user documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/danmar/cppcheck, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies C/C++ static analysis; official site describes static C/C++ code analysis.
